## Change

Describe the problem and the smallest coherent change that resolves it.

## Evidence and scope

- Affected page, Wiki term or knowledge file:
- New or changed scientific claims:
- DOI, arXiv or official sources:
- Content status: `draft` / `reviewed` / `verified` / not applicable

## Checklist

- [ ] I did not add paper PDFs, archives, credentials or private data.
- [ ] New images include provenance and redistribution rights.
- [ ] Chinese and English UI text remain consistent where applicable.
- [ ] Equations define symbols and distinguish constants, examples and local targets.
- [ ] `npm run test:public` passes.
- [ ] `npm run check:public` passes.
- [ ] `npm test -- --run`, `npm run lint` and `npm run build` pass.
- [ ] Visual changes include desktop and mobile screenshots.
